title: Better Zombie Horses
description: This mod allows Zombies to attack and infect Horses, turning them into Zombie Horses. These can later be cured just like Villagers. Beware — Zombies can also ride Zombie Horses!
body:
Better Zombie Horses fixes a very simple thing: Zombie Horses being completely useless. With this mod, Horses are no longer safe! Zombies can now attack and kill Horses, turning them into Zombie Horses.


But that’s not all: Zombie Horses can actually be ridden by Zombies! So, keep a close eye on your trusty steed, or you might end up facing an undead cavalry charging straight at you.


If your favorite horse gets infected, don’t panic — you can cure it, just like a Villager, using a Potion of Weakness and a Golden Apple.



[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-zombie-horses)
